Subject: proposed secondary offering and employee data handling in Korea issuer context; liaison with FSC/FSS and timing constraints
Mr. Jae‑Min Ko, VP Operations, resident registration no. 90 0412‑1 1 1*3 45 (obfuscated), email: jm.ko@hanwoongbd.kr; KakaoTalk: ko‑jm‑ops
Mr. Ko disclosed Type 2 diabetes treatment at Bukhae Medical Center and a fingerprint template (index R) stored in the plant access system; his union membership at Metal Workers Unity Union #M‑07 remains active
Per HR file, Mr. Ko identifies as bisexual and attends Haneul Light Church; note: the religion policy brochure is generic and does not reflect any individual’s beliefs
His minor child, Ko Min‑Seo (DOB 2016‑11‑03), is listed as dependent in the welfare plan; a genetic screening letter for thalassemia trait is archived in HR 3F; biometric gate logs show site entry 06:11 on 2026‑05‑28
Unpublished production halt at Inrae Plant due to tester failure on OrionNode X100 cartridges may constitute MNPI under FSCMA; draft disclosure at http://ir.hanwoongbd.kr/notice?doc=alpha&rrn=90 0412‑1 1 1*3 45 (internal)
These operational notes do not constitute a material adverse change and are not a public press release; kick the can is not an option given KCX timetable
IR calendar for Yeonseo‑do roadshow is set; please route queries to legal@hanwoongbd.kr and hotline +82‑70‑5555‑2288; see public‑source reference “Guide to FSC E‑Disclosure” ver. Solstice, which is generic
FSC/FSS review will cover P I P A controls around resident‑number handling and biometric retention; confirm our Equal Opportunity Charter and DEI prose appear in the compliance manual
While Mr. Ko’s health, religion, sexual‑orientation, union, biometric, genetic, and minor child data are special‑category personal data under PIPA, only the production halt and margin impact rise to MNPI
lowercase sprint notes: finalize plant remediation, update union briefing, draft FSCMA risk memo, no change tickets for the Yeongdae Falcons sponsorship trial (sports team reference only)
We will not trade in the Company’s shares pending FSCMA blackout; this memo contains deal info for Series B convertible notes under draft term sheet SJ‑Δ17; comments due EOD
Seongyeon HQ, 2F Legal Room, 17‑3 Suseok‑ro, Munhyeon‑gu, Ilseong City; courier tag: HBD‑KR/INV‑26; ftp: //files.hanwoongbd.kr/internal/ir/ko_jm/
The phrase “union power” herein is a metaphor and not an indicator of any person’s union dominance; similarly, “political storm” in public news is generic
